fields.summary: Returns the design coordinates for the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: An array of design coordinates for the named instance.

entries.signature: public int GetNamedInstanceDesignCoords (int instanceIndex, Span<float> coords);

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the design coordinates for the specified named instance.

params.coords: The span to fill with design coordinate values.
params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The number of design coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.

fields.summary: Returns the number of design coordinates for the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The number of design coordinates for the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name identifier for the PostScript name of the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> of the PostScript name for the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name identifier for the subfamily name of the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> of the subfamily name for the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name identifier for the name of the specified palette color entry.

params.colorIndex: The zero-based index of the color entry within the font's color palettes.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> of the palette color entry's name.

fields.summary: Returns all color values in the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.

fields.returns: An array of <c>hb_color_t</c> values (packed as BGRA in a <see langword="uint" />) for the palette.

entries.signature: public int GetPaletteColors (int paletteIndex, Span<uint> colors);

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the color values in the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.
params.colors: The span to fill with <c>hb_color_t</c> color values.

fields.returns: The number of color values written into <paramref name="colors" />.

fields.summary: Returns the flags describing the usage of the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.

fields.returns: A <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeColorPaletteFlags" /> value indicating whether the palette is suitable for light or dark backgrounds.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name identifier for the name of the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> of the palette's name.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with information about the font's variation axes.

params.axes: The span to fill with variation axis information.

fields.returns: The number of variation axis entries written into <paramref name="axes" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this font face contains color layer data (COLR table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains a COLR color layers table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this font face contains embedded PNG color glyphs (sbix table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains embedded PNG images; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this font face contains embedded SVG color glyphs (SVG table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains embedded SVG images; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this font face contains color palette data (CPAL table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains a CPAL color palettes table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this font face contains OpenType variable font data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains variable font axes (fvar table); otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in this variable font face.
fields.value: The total number of named instances in the font's fvar table.

fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes defined in this font face.
fields.value: The total number of color palettes in the font's CPAL table.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);

fields.summary: Attempts to find the variation axis with the specified tag.

params.tag: The four-byte tag identifying the variation axis to find.
params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains the axis information if found. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the axis was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in this variable font face.
fields.value: The total number of variation axes in the font's fvar table.

fields.summary: Gets an array describing all variation axes defined in this variable font face.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo" /> structs, one per axis, or an empty array if the font has no variation data.
